zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Bradshaw於1426年7月12日出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾黑格時，她的父親Thomas Bradshaw18歲，母親Alice Sherburne24歲。她於1455年1月1日與John Parker在英國艾可格斯廷索普結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1511年在英國英格蘭貝德福爾享年85歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Bradshaw于1426年7月12日出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾黑格时，她的父亲Thomas Bradshaw18岁，母亲Alice Sherburne24岁。她于1455年1月1日与John Parker在英国艾可格斯廷索普结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1511年在英国英格兰貝德福爾享年85岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Bradshaw
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Bradshaw in Lancashire, Yorkshire, and Derbyshire, from Old English brād ‘broad’ + sceaga ‘thicket’.

variants.name: Brayshaw
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of   Bradshaw  , reflecting the local Yorkshire pronunciation.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Bradshaw was born on 12 July 1426, in Haigh, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Bradshaw, was 18 and her mother, Alice Sherburne, was 24. She married John Parker on 1 January 1455, in Gestingthorpe, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1511, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 85, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Bradshaw est née le 12 juillet 1426, à Haigh, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Bradshaw, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Alice Sherburne, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé John Parker le 1 janvier 1455, à Gestingthorpe, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1511, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Bradshaw am 12. Juli 1426 in Haigh, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Bradshaw 18 und ihre Mutter Alice Sherburne 24. Sie hat am 1. Januar 1455 in Gestingthorpe, Essex, England John Parker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1511 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Bradshaw è nata il il 12 luglio 1426 nel Haigh, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Bradshaw, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Alice Sherburne, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato John Parker il 1 gennaio 1455, nel Gestingthorpe, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1511, nel Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolta a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Bradshawが1426年7月12日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアヘイグで生まれた時，父Thomas Bradshawは18歳，母Alice Sherburneは24歳であった。1455年1月1日にイギリスエセックスジェスティンソルペでJohn Parkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1511年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで85歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Bradshaw(이)가 1426년 7월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 하이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Bradshaw(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Sherburne(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1455년 1월 1일 영국 에세스 그스틴그소에서 John Parker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1511년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Bradshaw nasceu em 12 de julho de 1426, em Haigh, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Bradshaw, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Alice Sherburne, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com John Parker em 1 de janeiro de 1455, em Gestingthorpe, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1511, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 85 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Bradshaw родилась 12 июля 1426 г. в местности хеиг, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Bradshaw было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Sherburne, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Parker 1 января 1455 г. в местности джестингтаурп, эссекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1511 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 85 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alice Bradshaw nació el 12 de julio de 1426, en Haigh, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Bradshaw, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Alice Sherburne, tenía 24 años. Se casó con John Parker el 1 de enero de 1455, en Gestingthorpe, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1511, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultada en Inglaterra.
